item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 11min When Navy All-American DT Landon Robinson wants a break from football, he just hi
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 11min When Navy All-American DT Landon Robinson wants a break from football, he just hits the weight room instead — where he routinely squats 700 pounds! 0:49 Cita Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 15 abr. 0:21 Navy DT Landon Robinson, who grew up in Ohio, would be honored just to play in the NFL, but…
“My dad always watched the Bengals. He was a big Bengals fan. So it’d be really cool to play for them.” x.com/schultz_report… 2 6 64 16 mil

item.description:
Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 39min The Stanley Cup Playoffs are a different game
If you’re betting them like the regular season… you’re doing it wrong.
Key strategies you need to know from @ByScottCullen
https:// pinnacle.com/betting-resour ces/en/hockey/how-to-bet-on-the-stanley-cup-playoffs-hockey-betting-strategies … No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 1 292
